mapper.select: select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_AREA_D where deleted is null or deleted = 0 order by sort asc, id asc
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_AREA_D where id = #{id} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
mapper.update: MERGE INTO ODS_DWEQ_DM_AREA_D t USING (SELECT #{id} id, #{parentId} parent_id, #{name} name, #{type} type, #{pathIds} path_ids, #{pathNames} path_names, #{sort} sort, #{deleted} deleted FROM dual) s ON (t.id = s.id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.parent_id = s.parent_id, t.name = s.name, t.type = s.type, t.path_ids = s.path_ids, t.path_names = s.path_names, t.sort = s.sort, t.deleted = s.deleted WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, parent_id, name, type, path_ids, path_names, sort, deleted) VALUES (s.id, s.parent_id, s.name, s.type, s.path_ids, s.path_names, s.sort, s.deleted)
